objective: Add an execution-environment preflight and active parallel root declarations so local gates remain strict without being blocked by intentionally active sibling lanes.
scope_boundary: Keep target worktree root, branch, and write-boundary enforcement strict.
Keep undeclared dirty forbidden roots as blockers.
Allow explicitly declared active parallel roots to warn instead of block.
Require every active parallel root declaration to include a non-empty reason.
Verify the behavior with focused local tests, Local CI Gate, and GitHub Actions.
out_of_scope: Cleaning or reverting dirty sibling repos.
Weakening write-boundary enforcement for the target worktree.
Making GitHub Actions ignore dirty roots; clean runners should remain authoritative.
Adding broad machine-local state files outside issue-scoped artifacts.
research_summary: Issue #284 exposed a repeated local blocker: `assert_execution_scope.py` correctly failed on dirty sibling roots, but those roots can be intentionally active in parallel lanes. The missing contract is a declared active-parallel-root list that preserves strict defaults while making active lanes explicit.

sprints.name: Planning And Scope
sprints.goal: Add issue-backed planning and implementation scope before code edits.
tasks: Add structured plan, PDCAR, cross-review, same-family exception, and execution scopes.
Update backlog/progress mirrors while issue #286 is active.
acceptance_criteria: Implementation scope declares script, test, docs, status, closeout, graph, and wiki write paths.

sprints.name: Active Parallel Root Enforcement
sprints.goal: Extend execution-scope validation so declared active parallel roots warn instead of blocking.
tasks: Require active parallel root entries to include repo path and reason.
Make dirty forbidden roots block unless their git root matches a declared active parallel root.
Emit warnings for declared active dirty roots.
Add focused tests for undeclared dirty roots, declared active roots, invalid declarations, and target worktree dirtiness.
acceptance_criteria: Undeclared dirty forbidden root still fails.
Declared active parallel root returns a warning and does not fail.
Target worktree out-of-scope changes still fail.
Malformed active root declarations fail at scope load.

sprints.name: Preflight And Evidence
sprints.goal: Add operator-friendly preflight and prove behavior locally and in CI.
tasks: Add `scripts/overlord/check_execution_environment.py` as a thin preflight wrapper.
Wire local tests and Local CI Gate evidence.
Record final GitHub Actions run evidence in closeout.
acceptance_criteria: Preflight reports PASS for clean/declared-active environment and returns nonzero for blockers.
Local CI Gate can pass this issue branch by declaring currently active parallel lanes.
GitHub Actions passes on the PR.
Closeout records command output and run IDs.

specialist_reviews.focus: Minimal implementation approach and test edge cases for active parallel roots.
specialist_reviews.summary: Recommended a local change: add optional `active_parallel_roots`, validate it as a subset of `forbidden_roots`, and convert only declared dirty sibling roots from failures to warnings.

alternate_model_review.summary: Subagent review accepted the minimal implementation approach and edge cases; tests cover those cases.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #286 may modify execution-scope validation, add an execution-environment preflight wrapper, update focused tests, update status artifacts, and record closeout evidence.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Implement active parallel root support and focused tests.

material_deviation_rules: If target worktree dirtiness is made non-blocking, stop and revise the plan.
If undeclared dirty forbidden roots stop blocking, stop and revise the implementation.
If consumer repo changes are needed, create a separate issue first.
If Local CI Gate still blocks for reasons other than undeclared sibling roots, fix forward before closeout.
